LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 664.6. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Sec 664.6
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Plaintiff AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's motion to enter judgment pursuant to CCP sec. 664.6.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Plaintiff AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's unopposed "motion to enter judgment pursuant to CCP sec. 664.6" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing: orders are signed. (see scanned orders for details)
